candidate_targets.rationale: Exact local identities connect charged incidence, bridge/beta values, and the CKM candidate while provenance gates remain testable.
Local branches exist, but no action Hessian selects rho_ch=3.
Same-scale identity transport is exact; nontrivial transport lacks a generator.
The stochastic/channel route is conditional and still depends on normalization.
Boundary operators are structurally integrated, while their complete-action origin remains open.
It has high leverage but physical normalization units are absent.
Shape and identity pieces exist; physical units remain absent.
The normalized complete action and scalar profile remain unavailable.
External licensed/runtime tools are unavailable and cannot close theory provenance.
